method: Set difference between all GeoSampa cemetery features and feature IDs already validated as part of the municipal concession network; unmatched features were grouped by normalized name and address.
critical_finding: The current GeoSampa capture labels every feature as MUNICIPAL in the administrative-sphere field, including cemeteries that appear to be private, associative or religious. This attribute cannot be used to separate ownership regimes.
limitations: An unmatched feature may be private, associative, religious, inactive, duplicated or otherwise outside the concession inventory.
The count must be checked against SP Regula, SVMA, sanitary and fiscal records before publication.
The GeoSampa layer is useful for spatial inventory but not sufficient to establish legal ownership or operational status.
